label: Transparent dragon fruit motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Dragon Fruit transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a dragon fruit motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A ripe dragon fruit with waxy hot-pink skin, lime-green scale tips, one whole fruit and one sliced half showing crisp white pulp with tiny black seeds, glossy tropical orchard freshness, and clean commerce-ready silhouette. It must read as dragon fruit, not pomegranate, lychee, cactus flower, or generic tropical fruit.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include whole fruit, sliced half, green scales, white pulp, and black seeds without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no fruit basket, no leaves covering the fruit, no plate, no hand, no market stall, no text, no watermark, no second unrelated fruit.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Dragon Fruit light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Dragon Fruit", derived from the visible dragon fruit cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible bold commerce UI theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Dragon Fruit, Dragon Fruit Skin and Pulp, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from pitaya hot pink skin, rind rose gradients, lime-green scales, orchard chartreuse highlights, white pulp surfaces, tiny black seed texture, deep ink contrast, and soft blush tints. The board must read as dragon fruit, not generic pink commerce.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter Variable, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Caption, Numbers, 日本語タイポグラフィ. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, product card, ecommerce dashboard metrics, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, icon examples.
Style: bold commerce system, precise 8px grid, hot-pink primary actions, lime success accents, black seed texture, white pulp surfaces, Japanese ecommerce labels, clean card rhythm, bright but controlled contrast.
Constraints: no generic neon palette, no purple/blue gradient kit, no unrelated fruit, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Dragon Fruit", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Dragon Fruit dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Dragon Fruit". It must feel like the visible light board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible dragon fruit cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Dragon Fruit, Dark Mode, Dragon Fruit Skin and Pulp, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Preserve the dragon fruit system language: near-black seed backgrounds, hot-pink primary controls, lime scale success, rind rose hover states, pulp-white text, Japanese ecommerce labels, seed-speck texture, and 8px shadcn/tweakcn component grid.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Inter Variable, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Caption, Numbers, 日本語タイポグラフィ. Keep text short and legible on dark commerce surfaces.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, product card, ecommerce dashboard metrics, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, icon examples.
Visual details: dark ink panels, magenta active states, lime-green charts and success labels, seed-black texture, soft blush accents, crisp product-table cards, restrained dark contrast.
Constraints: no generic neon cyber UI, no purple/blue gradients, no unrelated fruit, no pure-black-only flat background, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Dragon Fruit", no illegible tiny paragraphs.
